title: Flight Booking
description: Google Flights–style search and results: expandable search form with airport autocomplete, date price bar, filter sidebar, emissions labels, sponsored placements mixed with real fares, mega-menu navigation, and cookie consent.
challenges: Expandable search form hidden behind collapsed summary bar
Basic Economy decoy priced below standard Economy nonstop fares
Sponsored results disguised as real flight cards
Mega-menu with dozens of nested navigation links
Filter sidebar with range sliders and collapsed sections
Date price bar with clickable alternatives
Tracking pixels and analytics scripts in DOM
Fare comparison tables hidden behind toggle buttons

task.goal: Select the cheapest nonstop Economy flight from JFK to LAX Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal (not a later confirmation, checkout, or competitor trap).

standardSteps.note: Agent parses 200+ elements, finds 40+ clickable targets
Mistakenly clicks promotional ad link in mega-menu
Returns to search results, re-parses DOM
Clicks inline promotional banner thinking it's a flight
Confused by promotional content mixed with results
Tries to sort by price but unsure which select element
Finally identifies correct button after multiple attempts
No confirmation — must re-parse DOM to verify selection

agentdomSteps.note: Gets structured flight results with stops, prices, and emissions
Identifies SW1042 standard Economy $329 as cheapest nonstop (DL892 Basic Economy is restricted)
Direct action on typed node with ActionResult confirmation

singleShot.goal: Select the cheapest nonstop Economy flight from JFK to LAX
